sellers_note: Discover the pinnacle of modern automotive design and engineering in the 2023 Nissan Rogue Platinum AWD. This exceptional SUV combines cutting-edge technology, premium comfort, and uncompromising performance to elevate your driving experience to new heights. Meticulously equipped with an impressive array of advanced features, the Rogue Platinum AWD is a true standout in its class. Key highlights include: - All-Wheel Drive - Apple CarPlay/Android Auto - Bluetooth - Cooling Seats - Cruise Control - Heated Seats - Leather Upholstery - Moonroof - Navigation System - Nissan Certified - Power Windows/Locks - Backup Camera - Keyless Entry - Premium Alloy Wheels - Remote Starter Beyond the impressive list of standard amenities, this Rogue also boasts the Platinum Premium Package, which adds Tri-Zone Climate Control, a Heads-Up Display, and Heated Rear Seats – elevating your comfort and convenience to the next level. Powered by a spirited 1.5L Turbocharged engine mated to a smooth Continuously Variable Transmission, the Rogue Platinum AWD delivers an exhilarating yet efficient driving experience. With an EPA-estimated 28 MPG in the city and 34 MPG on the highway, this SUV strikes the perfect balance between performance and fuel economy. Meticulously maintained and backed by Nissan's renowned reliability, this one-owner Rogue Platinum AWD is the perfect blend of style, technology, and capability. Whether navigating the daily commute or embarking on weekend adventures, this exceptional SUV is ready to elevate your driving experience to new heights. We invite you to experience the 2023 Nissan Rogue Platinum AWD firsthand. Schedule a test drive today and discover how this exceptional vehicle can transform your time behind the wheel.
